case_title: GEARY MANOR APARTMENTS, LP VS. CODY CRUZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEARY MANOR APARTMENTS, LP AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CODY AN INDIVIDUAL SEGURA, ERIN AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
